output.code:
# Let's load the provided text file and print it with indices etc.
path = "/mnt/data/file-7Bs3XXduhxjQJSdctCVxML-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

# Let's find the first ayah substring within quotes.
text = text  # already loaded
start0 = text.find('يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا')
start0, text[start0:start0+10]

# find closing double quote after the starting index
quote_close = text.find('"', start0)
# that's the one before the start? Wait start0 is inside quotes; we need the preceding quote first.
quote_open = text.rfind('"', 0, start0)
quote_close = text.find('"', start0)
quote_open, quote_close, text[quote_open:quote_open+1], text[quote_close:quote_close+1]

ayah1 = text[145:336]
ayah1

# find the hadith quoted in the main section
start_hadith_q = text.find('حيث قال النبي', 0)
start_hadith_q

# find quote open after that position
open2 = text.find('"', start_hadith_q)
close2 = text.find('"', open2+1)
open2, close2, text[open2:open2+1], text[close2:close2+1]

hadith1 = text[open2+1:close2]
hadith1, len(hadith1)

idx1 = text.find('يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا', close2)
idx1

# locate end by finding the '[' after idx1 and back up to exclude any whitespace/punct if needed
bracket_pos = text.find('[', idx1)
sub = text[idx1:bracket_pos]
sub[-10:], bracket_pos

ayah2 = text[idx1:bracket_pos]
ayah2

hadith1_refstart = text.find('ومن الأحاديث قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم:', idx1)
hadith1_refstart

colon_index = text.find(':', hadith1_refstart)
start_matn = colon_index + 1
# skip whitespace characters after colon
while start_matn < len(text) and text[start_matn].isspace():
    start_matn += 1
text[start_matn:start_matn+5], start_matn

br = text.find('[', start_matn)
context = text[start_matn:br]
context[-30:], br

# function to trim trailing whitespace/punct at edges per rule
def trim_edges_span(s, start_index):
    # remove leading whitespace and quotes/punct; but our start_matn is at first Arabic letter already
    # handle trailing spaces/punct
    allowed_remove = set(["'", '"', '«', '»', '(', ')', '[', ']', '،', '؛', ':', '.', ',', '!', '?', '…', ' '])
    end = start_index + len(s)
    # trim trailing whitespace/punct
    while end > start_index and text[end-1] in allowed_remove:
        end -= 1
    # trim leading - not needed but for safety
    while start_index < end and text[start_index] in allowed_remove:
        start_index += 1
    return start_index, end

start_h2, end_h2 = trim_edges_span(context, start_matn)
start_h2, end_h2, text[end_h2-1:end_h2+1]
text[start_h2:end_h2][-20:]

hadith2 = text[start_h2:end_h2]
hadith2

idx2 = text.find('يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا', br)
idx2

br2 = text.find('[', idx2)
ayah3 = text[idx2:br2].rstrip()  # but we want indices too
idx2, br2, ayah3[-10:]

hadith2_refstart = text.find('ومن الأحاديث قوله ﷺ:', br2)
hadith2_refstart

col2 = text.find(':', hadith2_refstart)
start_matn2 = col2 + 1
while start_matn2 < len(text) and text[start_matn2].isspace():
    start_matn2 += 1
br_after = text.find('[', start_matn2)
raw_snippet = text[start_matn2:br_after]
start_trim, end_trim = trim_edges_span(raw_snippet, start_matn2)
hadith3 = text[start_trim:end_trim]
start_trim, end_trim, hadith3[-20:]

# Let's compile the spans into a list and verify slicing
spans = [
    ("Aya", 145, 336),
    ("Hadeeth", 594, 967),
    ("Aya", 1986, 2177),
    ("Hadeeth", 2408, 2678),
    ("Aya", 3153, 3345),
    ("Hadeeth", 3560, 3828),
]
for typ, s, e in spans:
    snip = text[s:e]
    print(typ, s, e, "->", repr(snip[:20]), "...", repr(snip[-20:]))

print(repr(text[3340:3350]))
print(text[3340:3360])

# adjust trimming for ayah3
s3 = 3153
e3 = 3345
# create snippet and trim
sub3 = text[s3:e3]
# we must exclude trailing spaces/punct; again implement trimming
def trim_string_edges(start, end):
    allowed_remove = set(["'", '"', '«', '»', '(', ')', '[', ']', '،', '؛', ':', '.', ',', '!', '?', '…', ' '])
    # trim left
    while start < end and text[start] in allowed_remove:
        start += 1
    # trim right
    while end > start and text[end-1] in allowed_remove:
        end -= 1
    return start, end
new_s3, new_e3 = trim_string_edges(s3, e3)
repr(text[new_s3:new_e3][-5:]), new_s3, new_e3

# Let's reassemble the final spans list with corrected ayah3 end
final_spans = [
    {"citation_type": "Aya", "span_start": 145, "span_end": 336},
    {"citation_type": "Hadeeth", "span_start": 594, "span_end": 967},
    {"citation_type": "Aya", "span_start": 1986, "span_end": 2177},
    {"citation_type": "Hadeeth", "span_start": 2408, "span_end": 2678},
    {"citation_type": "Aya", "span_start": 3153, "span_end": 3344},
    {"citation_type": "Hadeeth", "span_start": 3560, "span_end": 3828},
]
for d in final_spans:
    s, e = d["span_start"], d["span_end"]
    d["span_text"] = text[s:e]
final_spans

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":145,"span_end":336,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":594,"span_end":967,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ. إِنّمَا هُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ تَقيّ وَفَاجِرٌ شَقيّ. النّاسُ كُلّهُمْ بَنُو آدَمَ. وآدَمُ خُلِقَ مِنَ تُرَابِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1986,"span_end":2177,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2408,"span_end":2678,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":3153,"span_end":3344,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":3560,"span_end":3828,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالَابَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
